headline: BofA Maintains Buy Rating on The Progressive Corporation (PGR)
summary: The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) is one of the 12 Undervalued Financial Stocks to Buy Now. On May 21, 2026, BofA analyst Joshua Shanker lowered the firm’s price target on The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) to $320 from $325 and maintained a Buy rating on the shares. Shanker said April operating EPS missed expectations, largely due to […]
